title: Mushroomies
description: New friendly Mobs that make the Mushroom Fields a bit more interesting. Mini Mushroomie and the Minitrader
body:
# Mushroomies
## Mini Mushroomie
The Mini Mushroomie is just a small Mob that has a special Hitbox, that acts more like a Block, so you can jump on it. They spawn in the Mushroom Fields, Dark Forests and the Cherry Blossom Biomes. 

## Minitrader
The Minitrader has 3 Trades to offer, so if you spawn in a Mushroom Field, you can get the Starter Equip even without a tree. No OP Trades, just some starter stuff.

## Mushroom Wood
New Wood/Plank, crafted by 4 Brown Mushrooms.
Missing Stairs and Slabs will later be added

## Help & Ideas
When you know how to fix this or have any Idea for this Mod or just want to help me improve the User Experience, then feel free to help me via Github for example.

https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Mushroomies-Mod/issues
